name: Pin Seeker Indoor Golf
about: Pin Seeker Indoor Golf is a premier golf simulator center located in Bremerton, WA, featuring state-of-the-art GOLFZON TwoVision technology. The facility offers an immersive virtual golf experience where players can access hundreds of courses worldwide. Rates are priced per hour and accommodate groups of up to six players without additional fees, making it a budget-friendly option for casual and serious golfers alike. The venue also provides a full suite of services including club fitting and repair, professional lessons, and event hosting, positioning itself as a comprehensive golf hub for the Pacific Northwest.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses GOLFZON TwoVision, the world's most advanced golf simulator recognized with Golf Digest's 'Editors' Choice' award for five consecutive years
Per-hour pricing model accommodates up to six players without extra charges, offering excellent value for groups
Full-service facility with custom club fitting, professional lessons, leagues, and event hosting capabilities

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen and food menu available

simulator_hardware.notes: World's most advanced golf simulator with Editors' Choice award from Golf Digest

faq.question: Do I need to bring my golf clubs?
faq.answer: You are welcome to bring your clubs to get the most authentic experience. However, rental sets are available for men, women, and juniors.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full kitchen and bar with food and drinks available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically, playing 18 holes for four people takes about four hours, but with efficient simulator technology, you can play at your own pace.

faq.question: Is Pin Seeker kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Pin Seeker is for everyone including beginners, with junior rental clubs available and a welcoming atmosphere for all skill levels.
